action_set_definitions.name: get_satellite_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current orbital and system status of a specific satellite, including fuel levels, battery status, and altitude.

satellite_id.description: The unique identifier of the satellite (e.g., 'SAT-SSO-MLT-B').

action_set_definitions.name: get_drift_rate
action_set_definitions.description: Measures the current Mean Local Time (MLT) drift rate of the satellite.

satellite_id.description: The unique identifier of the satellite.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_maneuver_requirements
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the required change in inclination (delta-i) to achieve a target drift rate and estimates propellant consumption.

current_drift_rate.description: The measured drift rate in seconds per day.

target_drift_rate_min.description: The minimum desired positive drift rate.

action_set_definitions.name: request_fds_ca_clearance
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the proposed trajectory change to the Flight Dynamics System (FDS) for Conjunction Assessment (CA) clearance. Returns a clearance token if the path is safe.

satellite_id.description: The unique identifier of the satellite.

inclination_delta.description: The planned change in orbital inclination in degrees.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_inclination_correction
action_set_definitions.description: Unlocks thrusters and executes the orbital burn to change inclination. Requires a valid CA clearance token.

satellite_id.description: The unique identifier of the satellite.

inclination_delta.description: The degrees of inclination change to apply.

clearance_id.description: The valid CA clearance token provided by FDS.

action_set_definitions.name: wait_for_recharge
action_set_definitions.description: Suspends activities to allow the solar panels to charge the battery to a specific target percentage.

satellite_id.description: The unique identifier of the satellite.

target_percent.description: The battery percentage level to reach before resuming.

state_description.satellite_id: Unique identifier for the satellite being managed.
state_description.orbit_altitude_km: Current altitude above the mean sea level in kilometers.
state_description.orbital_velocity_kms: Current tangential velocity in kilometers per second.
state_description.battery_charge_percent: Current energy storage level as a percentage of total capacity.
state_description.last_maneuver_timestamp: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last executed orbital correction.
